title: GMS Week 37 - FOOD FOR THOUGHT!
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 18/09/2023
Image reference: 2023-09-18_gms-week-37-food-for-thought_img1.jpg
Bullish Buyers in both, the Indian and Pakistani markets, continue to push on for another week as they manage to securesome of the recently recorded, high-priced sales from both - the dry bulk and container sectors. Some of the recent container sales (in particular) have caught the eyes of many in the industry, especially as levels gradually edge back up into the high USD 500s/LDT (approaching USD 600/LDT), thereby providing prospective Owners of vintage units, food for thought about the potential future of their aging beauties. India certainly has been the chief driver behind much of the recent activity, as domestic steel plate prices once again posted decent gains of about USD 13/LDT towards the end of the week.
